headline: Corning (GLW) Launches Gorilla Glass Ceramic 3 for Motorola razr fold
summary: Corning Incorporated (NYSE:GLW) is one of the best growth stocks to buy right now. On March 2, Corning Inc. announced the launch of Corning Gorilla Glass Ceramic 3, its toughest glass-ceramic material to date. Engineered for long-term durability rather than just initial performance, the new material is designed to withstand the rigors of everyday accidents […]
